message:
✨ Add progressive loading for multi-cluster cards (#808)

* ✨ Add progressive loading for multi-cluster cards

Cards that fetch from multiple clusters now show results progressively
as each cluster completes, instead of waiting for all clusters to finish.
This provides a much faster perceived load time for dashboards with 5+
clusters.

- Add `progressiveFetcher` option to `useCache` infrastructure
- `CacheStore.fetch()` calls `onProgress` with partial data as clusters complete
- Update all multi-cluster fetchers with `onProgress` callback:
  fetchFromAllClusters, fetchPodIssuesViaAgent, fetchDeploymentsViaAgent,
  fetchWorkloadsFromAgent, fetchSecurityIssuesViaKubectl
- Wire progressive fetcher in 7 cached hooks: pods, pod-issues,
  deployment-issues, deployments, services, workloads, security-issues
- Zero card component changes needed — they react via useSyncExternalStore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Update TODO list with completed items

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
